explanation: Reordering: The command line uses a benign placeholder path (C:\Lab\input\mimikatz.exe) and reorders the arguments to avoid the suspicious 'mimikatz' keyword detection.
Substitution: The command line replaces the suspicious 'mimikatz' keyword with a benign placeholder path (C:\Lab\input\mimikatz.exe) while retaining the same executable family for testing.
Insertion: The command line inserts a benign domain name (LABDOMAIN) and uses a placeholder path (C:\Lab\input\mimikatz.exe) to avoid the suspicious Sigma indicators.
